sentences.english: I have a small white cat named Snow.
sentences.korean: 작고 하얀 고양이가 있어요. 이름은 스노우예요.

sentences.english: She likes to sleep on my bed all day.
sentences.korean: 하루 종일 내 침대에서 자는 걸 좋아해요.

sentences.english: She also loves to play with a small red ball.
sentences.korean: 작은 빨간 공으로 노는 것도 좋아해요.

sentences.english: Every morning she wakes me up by sitting on my face.
sentences.korean: 매일 아침 내 얼굴 위에 앉아서 깨워요.

sentences.english: I love her even though she is a little naughty sometimes.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
